name: verify-public-surface
prompt: Use the daily-newsletter skill to verify whether this repository is ready for a public user to understand and run without private credentials.
expected_behavior: Reads README.md, SKILL.md, examples/, GOTCHAS.md, and workflow graph docs.
Runs pytest and graph validators before making claims.
Separates public verification from private production runs.

name: debug-missing-x-saved
prompt: My X saved item was captured today but did not appear in the Daily Inbox. Use daily-newsletter to diagnose it.
expected_behavior: Checks raw, unprocessed, processed, run-report, and pending_x_saved_raw before rerunning production.
Distinguishes late-arriving captured raw from truly missing ingestion.
Does not treat source health warnings as reader-facing content.

name: safe-feishu-delivery-check
prompt: Use daily-newsletter to check whether today's digest was sent to Feishu.
expected_behavior: Inspects sent artifacts and processed/receipts/feishu first.
Does not resend unless explicitly instructed.
Reports delivery status with artifact paths and receipt status.
